doctrine.source: Local Instacart item export; raw CSV remains uncommitted.
doctrine.purpose: Exact grocery vocabulary coverage after the first Instacart round.
hold_notes: Cucumber, serrano, mint, lemongrass, butter, rice, and most cheeses are intentionally held for anchor or doctrine decisions.
This batch is limited to produce, eggs, half-and-half, buttermilk, flour, and sugar where target identity is stable.

aliases.reason: Potted is a purchase format; raw basil identity is unchanged.
Brand and size descriptor do not change blueberry identity.
Plural grocery wording routes to the existing raw shallot anchor.

aliases.alias: vital farms pasture raised organic large grade a eggs
aliases.reason: Brand, color, and housing claims do not change large egg macro identity.
Bosc pears route to the existing raw pear anchor for practical logging.
Plural spoken/grocery form routes to raw lemon.
Instacart NULL prefix is export noise; Bosc pears route to raw pear.

aliases.alias: happy egg heritage breed blue and brown free range large grade a eggs
aliases.reason: Brand, breed, shell color, and housing claims route to large eggs.

aliases.alias: happy egg heritage breed blue and brown free range eggs
aliases.reason: Brand, breed, shell color, and housing claims route to large eggs.

aliases.alias: h e b grade aa cage free large brown eggs
aliases.reason: Store brand, grade, shell color, and housing claims route to large eggs.
Store and organic labels do not change plain half-and-half identity.

aliases.alias: national sales cilantro and chinese parsley bunch
aliases.reason: Chinese parsley is cilantro; bunch is purchase format.
Brand and Hass variety route to edible raw avocado.
Brand label does not change blueberry identity.
Brand and shell color route to large eggs.
Mini-cut carrots route to the existing raw baby carrot anchor.
Size and organic labels do not change edible raw avocado identity.
Organic label does not change raw cilantro identity.
Bag is packaging; Hass avocado routes to edible raw avocado.
Yellow and white raw onions are close practical equivalents for pantry logging.
Singular color-specific grocery wording routes to the generic bell pepper anchor.

aliases.alias: bobs red mill white all purpose baking flour unbleached
aliases.reason: Exact Instacart apostrophe-normalized wording for all-purpose flour; bleaching is a minor pantry-level difference.

aliases.alias: c and h premium pure cane granulated sugar
aliases.reason: Exact Instacart ampersand-normalized wording for granulated sugar.

aliases.alias: h e b 1 low fat buttermilk
aliases.reason: Store brand 1% low-fat buttermilk routes to existing low-fat buttermilk.
Store-brand plain sugar routes to granulated sugar.
